content:
STOP testing expo/.env.

Audit the active deployment runtime only.

For each runtime (Render production, GitHub Actions, deployment worker):

1. List every GitHub token variable name.
2. Report whether the variable exists.
3. Report the token type (classic or fine-grained).
4. Test GET /user.
5. Test GET repository.
6. Test PUT contents.

Do not print token values.

Return only:
- Variable name
- Exists: YES/NO
- HTTP status
- Authentication result
- Which runtime is actually used for deployment

If multiple GitHub tokens exist, identify exactly which one is selected by the deployment worker and why.
